title: Appointment, Dismissal, or Resignation of Officers and Personnel.
content: 49 The LMA shall notify the Department of the appointment, dismissal, or resignation of any 50 officer, nominee, or personnel of the agency within thirty (30) calendar days from such 51 appointment, dismissal, or resignation. In case of appointment, the Department shall 52 require the submission of the following supporting documents: 53 54 a. Letter of appointment containing duties and responsibilities duly accepted by the 55 appointee; 56 b. NBI and MWPB multi-purpose clearances; 57 58 c. Bio-data and two (2) recent passport size pictures; and 59 60 18 d. Secretary’s Certificate reflecting the Board Resolution on the appointment of an 1 officer who is not a member of the Board of Directors. 2 3 Contractual personnel whose duties, functions, or engagement does not in any way 4 involve recruitment and placement activities – such as security guards, utility or cleaning 5 personnel, drivers, on-the-job trainees covered by formal MOAs with educational 6 institutions, and apprentices enrolled under TESDA’s apprenticeship program – shall be 7 explicitly excluded from this reportorial requirement. 8 9
